title: Make it Bigger 2
description: Changes the default Minecraft title screen size from 44 to 64 px so you can add text under it with texture packs
body:
### Wanted to make a title screen texture pack but failed? 
the problem is that Minecraft hard codes the bounds for the texture to 44px height...

**THIS MOD FIXES IS FOR GOOD**
making the bound height to 64px (exactly what is needed for the bottom text)

_WITH ABILITY TO CHANGE IT IN CONFIG FILES_

![example image](https://i.imgur.com/pocq8Vg.jpeg) 


![showcase](https://i.imgur.com/vJZONEh.png)

_was it so simple?_

for bugs write to my 

discord - multyfora

Email - aryuc06@gmail.com
